title: Drug Target
description: A biological target for drug development identified through Regeneron's genetics and research programs

name.description: Target name (gene symbol or protein name)

uniprotId.description: UniProt accession number for protein targets

biologicalFunction.description: Description of the target's biological role

diseaseArea.description: Disease areas the target is relevant to

modality.description: Drug modality applicable to this target

geneticValidation.description: Whether the target has been validated by human genetics evidence

rgcEvidence.description: Whether evidence comes from the Regeneron Genetics Center exome database
